untranslatable_reason: Pattern identification requires visual chart pattern recognition (unnamed reversal/continuation pattern from Bulkowski). No mathematical indicators provided in source for identifying this specific pattern formation. Signal relies on manual pattern identification rather than quantifiable price/technical conditions. The 55%/45% reversal/continuation split and market condition dependencies cannot be operationalized without the pattern definition itself.
translation_notes: This signal describes a visual candlestick/price pattern with context-dependent behavior rather than a quantifiable rule set. Source indicates pattern appears in ~464 formations (1991-2003) but provides no mathematical definition. Placeholder entry/exit conditions use basic price breakout logic, but these do NOT represent the actual pattern rule. Author (Bulkowski) did not provide exit conditions (AUTHOR_SILENT), so reversal thresholds were inferred. Backtest engine cannot execute this rule without either: (1) explicit pattern definition in terms of allowed indicators, or (2) manual pattern labeling in historical data.
